description_long: This armchair features a boxy, modern silhouette with broad, gently curved armrests and a thick, cushioned seat. The upholstery is a deep, muted blue with a subtle, mottled texture, giving it a soft and inviting appearance. The backrest is slightly reclined and padded, providing comfortable support for the user. The chair stands on four short, dark legs that are slightly tapered, elevating it just above the ground. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible decorative elements or seams. This armchair would be well-suited for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor patios.
description: A modern, boxy armchair with deep blue mottled upholstery, broad curved armrests, and short dark legs. It has a thick cushioned seat and a slightly reclined padded backrest.
description_view_0: Side view showing the broad, curved armrest and the thickness of the seat and backrest.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the full width of the backrest and the straight, unadorned back panel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the armrest and seat thickness seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the wide seat cushion, both armrests, and the slightly reclined padded backrest.
attribute_armrest_design: broad, padded, and upholstered with rounded edges
attribute_backrest_style: medium-height, slightly reclined, padded and upholstered
attribute_upholstery_pattern: solid color with subtle mottled texture
